title: Opening for Store Manager at Hypercity Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Hypercity Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Hypercity Advisory Limited in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hypercity Advisory Limited:
Hypercity Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hypercity Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
